justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering a range of options, which led to multiple unproductive turns.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made several redundant API calls, especially when checking for availability on the same day or around the same time, which could have been avoided by broadening the search more effectively.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was extremely frustrating due to repeated unavailability of slots and the agent's inability to proactively offer suitable alternatives, leading to the user abandoning the conversation.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent struggled to recover from unavailable slots, repeatedly checking for exact times requested by the user even after previous attempts failed, rather than intelligently expanding the search or offering a wider range of options.

overall_notes: The agent's main failing was its inability to proactively suggest alternative times when a requested slot was unavailable, leading to a highly frustrating experience for the user who had to repeatedly guide the agent with new time preferences.
